scan.method: content-verified contract read + authoritative docs cross-check
scan.version_policy: Do not infer version/status from filename alone; require contract contents, declarations, comments, authoritative docs, and existing civilization indices.

read_order.role: BrainExchange contract source of implementation facts
Brain + Heart deploy and init wiring; locked source, read only
Authoritative KGEN chain address docs; no Brain address found in this pass
Core V7.5.2 triad positioning; Brain not listed in triad
Portal-displayed Brain 11520 deployment status and node map

version_evidence.evidence: Inline contract comment names `KGEN_BrainExchange_V3_2_0.sol` and identifies `11520｜花果山台灣・悟空大腦交易所（BrainExchange）`.
Contract declaration is `contract KGEN_BrainExchange_V3_2_0 is OwnableLite, ReentrancyGuardLite`; used as supporting evidence, not sole source.
Deploy script requests `getContractFactory("KGEN_BrainExchange_V3_2_0")` before deploying Heart.
Existing civilization contract map records 11520 contract name/version as `KGEN_BrainExchange_V3_2_0` / `V3_2_0`.

role_evidence.evidence: Spec comments define reward tax inflow, margin staking, monthly payroll split, supplyHeart to TempleHeart, and config locking.
Section 3.4 identifies Species 11520 as `TYPE: BrainExchange` and `FUNCTION: Civilization Brain / Exchange Runtime`.
Defines 11520 as `Universe Brain Exchange`, not a normal exchange, stock market, NFT platform, or ordinary token swap.
Existing dedicated index classifies 11520 as `Brain Civilization` with role `Universe Brain / Brain Exchange Runtime`.

status_evidence.evidence: Existing contract row marks BrainExchange as `SOURCE_ONLY`; this index keeps source status separate from portal display status.
This indexing pass found no `Brain`, `11520`, or `KGEN_BrainExchange` entry in KGEN/README.md; no authoritative KGEN README Brain address was verified.
Portal KPI/node map displays `Brain 11520` as deployed and shows address `0xd0605F4EF10e5C1438F11AF9edc36926769239d6`.

status_evidence.source: K線西遊記/temples/12345/index.html and K線西遊記/temples/108000/index.html
status_evidence.evidence: Temple runtime displays repeat the same Brain address; these are frontend/runtime references, not KGEN README deployment proof.

filename_inference_guard.rule: Filename is not the source of truth for version/status.
filename_inference_guard.result: Version is supported by contract comments, contract declaration, deploy script factory name, and existing civilization indices. Deployment status remains split: contract indices say SOURCE_ONLY, while Portal/temple UI display the Brain address as deployed; KGEN/README does not independently document the Brain address.

runtime_model.automation_note: Solidity has no scheduler; rollPayroll requires human, owner, keeper, or other transaction trigger.

payroll_split_defaults.rest: stays in Brain and may be swept to treasury by owner

fund_flow.principal_protection: rollPayroll calculates distributable as KGEN balance minus totalMargin; staked margin principal is not counted as distributable.

downstream.mechanism: marsBps payroll transfer followed by notifyReward
publicGoodBps payroll transfer when address is configured

order: deploy KGEN_BrainExchange_V3_2_0 with KGEN_TOKEN, TREASURY, NEXT_PAYROLL_AT
transfer Brain and Heart ownership to NEW_OWNER

kgen_layer.meaning: BrainExchange is part of the KGEN on-chain civilization contract layer, separate from the V7.5.2 core triad.

contract_layer.meaning: 11520 maps to the BrainExchange contract and downstream Heart/Mars runtime links.

portal_layer.meaning: Portal displays Brain 11520 as live/deployed but not clickable.

token.mechanism: Token rewardWallet 0.05% tax flow is the expected Brain inflow.

heart_12345.mechanism: Brain supplies Heart via `supplyHeart`; deploy script sets Heart brainVault.

mars_108000.mechanism: Brain payroll sends Mars share and calls `notifyReward`.

known_gaps.detail: KGEN/README.md documents Token, LP pair, and Genesis Inscription addresses, but this pass found no Brain 11520 address or BrainExchange deployment entry.
Portal and temple UI display Brain as deployed at 0xd0605F4EF10e5C1438F11AF9edc36926769239d6, but no external chain explorer/RPC bytecode verification was performed.
deploy_all.js wires Brain to Heart, but this pass found no authoritative repo document proving live setMarsSeats, setPublicGoodTreasury, setKeeper, lockConfig, or Token rewardWallet configuration.
11520 remains graph-only with no K線西遊記/temples/11520/ runtime folder or DNA quartet.

active_conflicts.detail: CONTRACT_INDEX classifies BrainExchange source as SOURCE_ONLY, while Portal and temple UI display Brain 11520 as deployed at 0xd0605F4EF10e5C1438F11AF9edc36926769239d6. Treat these as different evidence layers until KGEN/README or chain verification confirms deployment.
KGEN/README.md is authoritative for Token/LP/Genesis addresses but has no Brain entry found in this pass; do not promote Brain to README-verified DEPLOYED status from portal labels alone.
